nasb.text: Now then arise early in the morning with the servants of your lord who have come with you, and as soon as you have arisen early in the morning and have light, depart.”

esv.text: Now then rise early in the morning with the servants of your lord who came with you, and start early in the morning, and depart as soon as you have light.”

cnv.text: 所以明天早晨，你和跟你來的人，就是你主人的僕人都要清早起來。你們明天早晨都要早起，天一亮你們就要離開。”

ccb.text: 明天一早，你就和从扫罗手下投奔你的人启程回去吧。”
